con:part.con:content: <application xmlns="http://wadl.dev.java.net/2009/02"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="RMCA"/> <resources base="http://localhost:13180"> <resource path="rmca/rest/internal/productOffering/{productOfferingId}" id="getProductOffering"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getProductOffering"/> <param name="productOfferingId" default="w468e969d4bf5a2f85d7ceebbe4782a0" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="getProductOffering"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getProductOffering"/> <request/> <response status="200"> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8; profile="http://ericsson.com/bss.rmca.ProductOffering.getResponseMessage.1.json#""/> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8"/> </response> <response status="404"> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8"/> <representation mediaType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1"/> </response> <response status="0"> <representation mediaType=""/> <representation mediaType=""/> <representation mediaType=""/> </response> </method> </resource> <resource path="rmca/billingManagement/v1/billingAccountSpecification/{billingAccountSpecId}" id="getBillingAccountSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getBillingAccountSpec"/> <param name="billingAccountSpecId" type="xs:string" required="false" default="" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="getBillingAccountSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getBillingAccountSpec"/> <request/> <response status="200"> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8; profile="http://ericsson.com/bss.rmca.BillingAccountSpecification.getResponseMessage.1.json#""/> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8"/> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8; profile="http://ericsson.com/bss.rmca.BillingAccountSpecification.getResponseArrayMessage.1.json#""/> </response> <response status="0"> <representation mediaType=""/> <representation mediaType=""/> </response> <response status="404"> <representation mediaType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1"/> </response> </method> </resource> <resource path="rmca/catalogManagement/v1/resourceSpecification/{resourceSpecId}" id="getResourceSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getResourceSpec"/> <param name="resourceSpecId" default="resourceSpecId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="getResourceSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getResourceSpec"/> <request/> <response status="200"> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8; profile="http://ericsson.com/bss.rmca.ResourceSpecification.getResponseMessage.1.json#""/> </response> </method> </resource> <resource path="rmca/billingManagement/v1/BillingAccountBucketSpecification/{billingAccountBucketSpecId}" id="getBillingAccountBucketSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getBillingAccountBucketSpec"/> <param name="billingAccountBucketSpecId" type="xs:string" required="false" default="" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="getBillingAccountBucketSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getBillingAccountBucketSpec"/> <request/> <response status="0"> <representation mediaType=""/> </response> <response status="404"> <representation mediaType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1"/> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8"/> </response> </method> </resource> <resource path="rmca/rest/internal/productSpecification/{productSpecificationId}" id="getProductSpecification"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getProductSpecification"/> <param name="productSpecificationId" default="productSpecificationId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="getProductSpecification"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getProductSpecification"/> <request/> <response status="404"> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8"/> </response> <response status="200"> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8"/> </response> </method> </resource> <resource path="rmca/rest/internal/eventTriggerDetails/{eventTriggerDetails}" id="getEventTriggerDetails"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getEventTriggerDetails"/> <param name="eventTriggerDetails" default="eventTriggerDetails" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="getEventTriggerDetails"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="getEventTriggerDetails"/> <request/> <response status="200"> <representation mediaType="application/json; charset=utf-8"/> </response> </method> </resource> <resource path="rmca/entityRead/v1/productOffering/{productOfferingId}" id="readProductOffering"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="readProductOffering"/> <param name="productOfferingId" type="xs:string" required="false" default="" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="readProductOffering"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="readProductOffering"/> <request/> <response status="400 404"> <representation mediaType="text/html;charset=ISO-8859-1"/> </response> <response status="0"> <representation mediaType=""/> </response> </method> </resource> </resources> </application>

<application xmlns="http://wadl.dev.java.net/2009/02"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="BAE"/> <resources base="http://bss-sd03-bae-1:8080"> <resource path="bae/bssfIndividualPartyManagement/v1/individualParty/" id="CreateParty"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateParty"/> <method name="POST" id="CreateParty"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateParty"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfCustomerManagement/v1/customer/" id="CreateCustomer"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateCustomer"/> <method name="POST" id="CreateCustomer"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateCustomer"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/customer/{CustomerId}/contract" id="CreateContract"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateContract"/> <param name="CustomerId" default="CustomerId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="POST" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/customer/{customerId}/contract/{contractId}" id="UpdateContract"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="UpdateContract"/> <param name="customerId" default="customerId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="contractId" default="contractId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="PATCH" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfCustomerEnquiry/v1/customer/?id={customerId}" id="GetCustomer"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetCustomer"/> <param name="customerId" default="customerId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfCustomerEnquiry/v1/customer/?externalId={CustomerExtId}" id="GetCustomerExternalID"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetCustomerExternalID"/> <param name="CustomerExtId" default="CustomerExtId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfCustomerManagement/v1/customer/{CustomerId}" id="DeleteCustomerId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteCustomerId"/> <param name="CustomerId" default="CustomerId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="DELETE" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfCustomerManagement/v1/customerExternalId/{CustomerExtId}" id="DeleteCustomerExternalId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteCustomerExternalId"/> <param name="CustomerExtId" default="CustomerExtId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="DELETE" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="cpi/bssfCustomerEnquiry/v1/customer/?communicationIdType=E.164&communicationId={msisdn}" id="GetCustomerCommunicationID-MSISDN"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetCustomerCommunicationID-MSISDN"/> <param name="msisdn" default="msisdn" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="cpi/bssfCustomerEnquiry/v1/customer/?communicationIdType=E.212&communicationId={imsi}" id="GetCustomerCommunicationID-IMSI"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetCustomerCommunicationID-IMSI"/> <param name="imsi" default="imsi" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionEnquiry/v1/contract?customerId={customerId}&contractId={contractId}" id="GetContract"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetContract"/> <param name="customerId" default="customerId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="contractId" default="contractId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionEnquiry/v1/contract?customerExternalId={customerExternalId}&contractExternalId={contractExternalId}" id="GetContractExternalID"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetContractExternalID"/> <param name="customerExternalId" default="customerExternalId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="contractExternalId" default="contractExternalId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="cpi/bssfSubscriptionEnquiry/v1/contract?communicationId={msisdn}&communicationIdType={communicationIdType}" id="GetContractCommunicationID-MSISDN"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetContractCommunicationID-MSISDN"/> <param name="msisdn" default="communicationId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="communicationIdType" default="communicationIdType" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="Method 1"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="Method 1"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfIndividualPartyManagement/v1/individualParty/{partyId}" id="DeletePartyId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeletePartyId"/> <param name="partyId" default="partyId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="DELETE" id="DeletePartyId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeletePartyId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfIndividualPartyEnquiry/v1/individualParty/?id={partyId}" id="GetPartyId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetPartyId"/> <param name="partyId" default="partyId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="GetPartyId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetPartyId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfIndividualPartyEnquiry/v1/individualParty/?externalId={partyexttId}" id="GetPartyExternalId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetPartyExternalId"/> <param name="partyexttId" default="partyextId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="GetPartyExternalId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="GetPartyExternalId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfIndividualPartyManagement/v1/individualPartyExternalId/{partyexttId}" id="DeletePartyExternalId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeletePartyExternalId"/> <param name="partyexttId" default="partyextId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="DELETE" id="DeletePartyExternalId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeletePartyExternalId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/customer/{customerId}/contract/{contractId}" id="DeleteContractId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteContractId"/> <param name="customerId" default="customerId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="contractId" default="contractId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="DELETE" id="DeleteContractId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteContractId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/customerExternalId/{customerextId}/contractExternalId/{contractextId}" id="DeleteContractExtId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteContractExtId"/> <param name="customerextId" default="customerextId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="contractextId" default="contractextId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="DELETE" id="DeleteContractExtId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteContractExtId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/communicationId/{msisdn}/communicationIdType/E.164/" id="DeleteContractCommID"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteContractCommID"/> <param name="msisdn" default="msisdn" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="DELETE" id="DeleteContractCommID"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="DeleteContractCommID"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfsdSubscriptionManagement/v1/manageConsumerList/" id="ManageConsumerlist"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ManageConsumerlist"/> <method name="POST" id="ManageConsumerlist"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ManageConsumerlist"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfUserManagement/v1/user/" id="CreateUser"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateUser"/> <method name="POST" id="CreateUser"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateUser"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/communication/{msisdn}/communicationType/E.164" id="UpdateProviderContractwithUser"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="UpdateProviderContractwithUser"/> <param name="msisdn" default="msisdn" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="PATCH" id="UpdateProviderContractwithUser"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="UpdateProviderContractwithUser"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/customerExternalId/{customerExternalId}/contractExternalId" id="CreateContractwithextId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateContractwithextId"/> <param name="customerExternalId" default="customerExternalId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="POST" id="CreateContractwithextId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="CreateContractwithextId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/customerExternalId/{customerExternalId}/contractExternalId/{contractExternalId}" id="UpdateContractwithextId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="UpdateContractwithextId"/> <param name="customerExternalId" default="customerExternalId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="contractExternalId" default="contractExternalId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="PATCH" id="UpdateContractwithextId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="UpdateContractwithextId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfBalanceEnquiry/v1/balance?customerExternalId={customerExternalId}&balanceType={balanceType}" id="ReadBalanceusingExternalId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ReadBalanceusingExternalId"/> <param name="customerExternalId" default="customerExternalId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="balanceType" default="balanceType" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="ReadBalanceusingExternalId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ReadBalanceusingExternalId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfBalanceEnquiry/v1/balance?communicationIdType={communicationIdType}&communicationId={communicationId}&balanceType={balanceType}" id="ReadBalanceusingCommunicationId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ReadBalanceusingCommunicationId"/> <param name="balanceType" default="balanceType" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="communicationIdType" default="communicationIdType" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="communicationId" default="communicationId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="ReadBalanceusingCommunicationId"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ReadBalanceusingCommunicationId"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfBalanceManagement/v1/productBucketAdjustment/adjust" id="AdjustProductBucketbalance"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="AdjustProductBucketbalance"/> <param name="ERICSSON.Global-Unique-Request-Id" type="xs:string" required="false" default="" style="query" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="ERICSSON.Generic-Interface-Parameters" type="xs:string" required="false" default="" style="query" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="POST" id="AdjustBillingAccountBucket"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="AdjustBillingAccountBucket"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfCustomerManagement/v1/customerExternalId/{customerExternalId}" id="{customerExternalId}"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="{customerExternalId}"/> <param name="customerExternalId" default="customerExternalId" type="xs:string" required="false" style="template" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="PATCH" id="UpdateCustomer"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="UpdateCustomer"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfPurchaseChargeManagement/v1/rateAndReserve" id="rateAndReserve"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="rateAndReserve"/> <method name="POST" id="RateAndReserve"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="RateAndReserve"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfPurchaseChargeManagement/v1/rateAndDeduct" id="rateAndDeduct"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="rateAndDeduct"/> <method name="POST" id="RateAndDeduct"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="RateAndDeduct"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfPurchaseChargeManagement/v1/basketRateAndReserve" id="basketRateAndReserve"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="basketRateAndReserve"/> <method name="POST" id="basketRateAndReserve"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="basketRateAndReserve"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfPurchaseChargeManagement/v1/basketRateAndDeduct" id="basketRateAndDeduct"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="basketRateAndDeduct"/> <method name="POST" id="basketRateAndDeduct"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="basketRateAndDeduct"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="bae/bssfSubscriptionManagement/v1/consumerList/modify" id="modify"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="modify"/> <method name="POST" id="ConsumerList"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ConsumerList"/> <request/> </method> </resource> </resources> </application>

<application xmlns="http://wadl.dev.java.net/2009/02"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="INV"/> <resources base="http://sts-beam-bill-044:13180"> <resource path="inv/billManagement/v1/docSpecification/c503c45a-a6ec-4439-abc6-370e0a8c9603" id="<billSpecificationId>"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="<billSpecificationId>"/> <method name="GET" id="ReadBillSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ReadBillSpec"/> <request/> </method> <method name="GET" id="ReadDocSpec"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="ReadDocSpec"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="inv/onCycleBillManagement/v1/billRun" id="billRun"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="billRun"/> <method name="POST" id="billRun"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="billRun"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="inv/offCycleBillManagement/v1/onDemandBillRun" id="onDemandBillRun"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="onDemandBillRun"/> <method name="POST" id="onDemandBilling"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="onDemandBilling"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="inv/invoiceEnquiry/v1/unbilledCharges" id="unbilledCharges"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="unbilledCharges"/> <param name="customerId" default="<customerId>" type="xs:string" required="false" style="query" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="billingAccountId" default="<baId>" type="xs:string" required="false" style="query" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <param name="callItemization" default="<true/false>" type="xs:string" required="false" style="query" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"/> <method name="GET" id="unbilledCharges"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="unbilledCharges"/> <request/> </method> </resource> <resource path="inv/invoiceEnquiry/v1/invoice/search" id="search"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="search"/> <method name="POST" id="invoice"> <doc xml:lang="en" title="invoice"/> <request/> </method> </resource> </resources> </application>

con:testCase.name: Manage Consumer List - Add Provider as consumer to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add consumer1 to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add consumer2 to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add consumer3 to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add Customer1(Prov)Contrt as consumer to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add Customer2Contrt as consumer to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add Provider as consumer to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add consumer1 to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add as consumer to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add consumer2 to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add Provider as consumer to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add consumer to consumer list
Manage Consumer List - Add consumer1 to consumer list

con:testSuite.name: CPM_Batch_Operation-Tasks
con:testSuite.con:description: This TestSuite contaims provisioning of VIVO Individual Subscriber STEP 1 : Set Random MSISDN and create party,customer and contract with Technical PO and create user STEP 2 : Update contract to add Franquia PO and other add-On POs STEP 3 : Read Customer using CPI and CPM Interface STEP 4 : Read Contract using CPI and CPM Interface STEP 5 : Read Balance using CPI Interface STEP 6 : Get Event History of the subscriber STEP 7: Update Contract to change Contract characteristics and Product characteristics STEP 8 : Update Contract to change Product Status and Contract Status STEP 9 : Delete Contract STEP 10 : Delete Customer

con:config.script: import java.util.TimeZone tz = TimeZone.getTimeZone("Europe/Stockholm") def ts = new Date() def sd = new Date() def shd = new Date() + 1 def ed = new Date() + 9999 ts.setSeconds(ts.getSeconds() ) //ts1.setSeconds(ts1.getSeconds()+10 ) //ts.setSeconds(ts.getSeconds() - 150) //println(ts) // 12:43:14 UTC 2018 //println(ts.format("HH:mm")) // 12:43 //println(ts.format("HH:mm", timezone=tz)) // 15:43 //def hours=(ts.format("HH:mm", timezone=tz)) currentDate =(ts.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX", timezone=tz)) startDate =(sd.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX", timezone=tz)) endDate =(ed.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX", timezone=tz)) scheduleDate =(shd.format("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX", timezone=tz)) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["InputData"].setPropertyValue("StartDate",currentDate) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["InputData"].setPropertyValue("EndDate",endDate) testRunner.testCase.testSteps["InputData"].setPropertyValue("ScheduleDate",scheduleDate) Random random = new Random() msisdn = (long)Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000000L) + 100000000L imsi = (long)Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000000000000L) + 100000000000000L batchjobIdReq = (long)Math.floor(Math.random() * 900000L) + 100000L testRunner.testCase.testSuite.setPropertyValue("msisdn","55" + String.valueOf(msisdn)) testRunner.testCase.testSuite.setPropertyValue("imsi",String.valueOf(imsi)) testRunner.testCase.testSuite.setPropertyValue("batchjobIdReq",String.valueOf(batchjobIdReq))
